settings_malware_override_desc: This will disable Quarantine Bay. By doing this, you are actively permitting malicious signatures and unauthorized payloads to execute within your sandbox.

workbench_author_guide_fields_desc:
template_id: Unique identifier for your template.
target_file: The exact name of the file this targets (e.g. mc_settings.cfg)
parser_type: The parser to use ("json" or "ini").
workbench_author_guide_intro: A workbench template maps an unstructured config file into a beautiful UI. Write your template in JSON on the right.
workbench_author_guide_settings_desc:
Define each UI control.
- key: The unique ID.
- path: The JSON path or INI key.
- type: "boolean", "number", "string".
- label_key: The display label.
- default: The fallback value.
workbench_author_mode_hint: Use the Author Mode by selecting a .json file to create one.
workbench_author_rename_desc: The target config file to overwrite.
workbench_author_save_success: Template saved successfully to your workspace!
workbench_fix_syntax: FIX JSON SYNTAX TO SEE PREVIEW
workbench_guide_desc: Define your UI using the settings array. Each object needs a key (matching the raw file), 	ype (boolean, number, string, dropdown), label_key, and category. Use the categories array to organize them into tabs.
workbench_no_file: Select a configuration file to begin.
workbench_no_file_desc: Open a configuration file from your loadout to begin editing settings.
workbench_no_settings_found: No settings found matching your criteria.
workbench_no_template_sub: Wait until one is made, or author one yourself.
workbench_preview_resolve: Resolve template errors to regenerate the visual preview.
workbench_switch_to_raw: Switch to Raw Editor to modify this file.
workbench_ui_no_selection_desc: Open the Workspace side panel to select a configuration file.
workbench_ui_not_supported: No visual template available for this file.
yeet_removing_following: REMOVING THIS WILL ALSO YEET THE FOLLOWING
template_active_default_msg: This is the active community default template
